response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior/staff full-stack engineer with strong craftsmanship, polyglot experience, and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling. However, the role is a Director-level Principal Engineer requiring ~15 years of experience with recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and cloud/AI strategy leadership. The resume shows roughly 11-13 years of professional experience, only minimal/recent AI involvement, no advanced degree, and no evidence of director-level strategic influence, executive advisory work, or shipped AI platforms at scale.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development)
Polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq
concerns: No demonstrated AI products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise at the level the role requires
Lacks director-level IC scope: no evidence of advising strategic customers or shaping cloud/AI strategy
Experience tenure and seniority signals fall short of the 15-year Principal/Director bar

key_factors.factor: Seniority and strategic scope below Director-level IC
Strong engineering craftsmanship and polyglot delivery
